base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_heart_small — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Small heart — +1 heart currency. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small heart — +1 heart currency; drops from enemies. In CV2 hearts are currency for purchases not subweapon ammo
